arts.ttl: 'Unrecognisable': Defiant Portsmouth boss John Mousinho's inquest into shock Stoke hammering
arts.sum: Pompey were ‘unrecognisable’ to a shell-shocked John Mousinho - now he has vowed to delve into their psyche to uncover why.

arts.ttl: Oxford United could be without six players for Portsmouth Championship clash
arts.sum: The U's boss posted an injury update following his side's 2-2 draw in Bedfordshire on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Stoke City boss 'disappointed' despite 6-1 thumping of Portsmouth
arts.sum: The opposition boss delivered his verdict on what was a disappointing night for Pompey in Staffordshire.
